description: Fuse the multi-modal raster products 'landsat_multispectral.tif' and 'srtm_dem.tif' from '/home/ga/snap_data/' into a single datacube. Perform a collocation using the Landsat image as the Master product and the SRTM DEM as the Slave product. Rename the resampled elevation band to 'elevation_resampled'. Save the final product in BEAM-DIMAP format to '/home/ga/snap_projects/ml_datacube.dim' and export it as a GeoTIFF to '/home/ga/snap_exports/ml_datacube.tif'.
